steps.t: Dingási has asked that you travel south to Arnach, and speak with Kholnedák, the supervisor in charge of the town's storage and shipping of stone. Kho…
Kholnedák has asked you to meet her near the northern farms in Arnach.
Kholnedák has asked you to investigate the bandit camp Aegollant, and to search for signs of the shoddy stones. Aegollant is in Lossarnach.
Within the ruins of Aegollant, you have found piles of the shoddy blocks which were snuck into the dwarves' superior piles of stone. You should invest…
While inspecting the shoddy stones in Aegollant, you were set upon by brigands. One of the bandits dropped a crumpled note, the details of which Kholn…
